title: lippia trachyphylla
intro: Lippia trachyphylla, also known as 'Mountain Bush Tea', is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lippia trachyphylla include its ability to treat fever, cough, and cold, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. Lippia trachyphylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
